title: K-200 Integration Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Integration Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-467-G. Revision: G. Type: design-note. Author: Aisha Mbeki. Created: 2024-08-23. Last modified: 2025-06-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1025, P-1119.
